title: Estatery - Real Estate Platform
description: A modern real estate platform for browsing, searching, and managing property listings.
longDescription: Estatery is a full-stack real estate platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. The application provides advanced property search, filtering, responsive property listings, user authentication, and an intuitive user experience. Form validation is powered by React Hook Form and Zod, while Zustand handles efficient client-side state management. The project focuses on scalable architecture, clean UI, and production-ready development practices.

title: CineTicket - Movie Ticket Booking Platform
description: An online movie ticket booking platform with a modern and responsive interface.
longDescription: CineTicket is a modern movie ticket booking application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Users can browse movies, explore showtimes, view detailed movie information, and experience a clean booking workflow. The project emphasizes responsive design, optimized performance, reusable components, and scalable frontend architecture.

title: BoiZaar - Online Book Marketplace
description: An online marketplace for discovering and purchasing books.
longDescription: BoiZaar is a modern book marketplace where users can browse books, search by categories, and explore product details. Built using Next.js and TypeScript, the application includes form validation with React Hook Form and Zod, global state management with Zustand, and a responsive interface focused on usability and performance.

title: Estatein - Real Estate Website
description: A premium real estate website built with Next.js.
longDescription: Estatein is a modern real estate website featuring elegant property showcases, search functionality, responsive layouts, and optimized performance. The project was developed to practice scalable component architecture, reusable UI, and modern frontend development using Next.js and TypeScript.

title: Task Manager Application
description: A task management application with authentication and state management.
longDescription: Task Manager is a productivity application that enables users to create, organize, update, and manage daily tasks efficiently. Built using Next.js and Redux Toolkit, the project demonstrates state management, reusable components, clean architecture, and responsive UI design. The demo backend is currently inactive.

title: Software Landing Page
description: A responsive landing page for showcasing software products and services.
longDescription: A modern software company landing page built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. The website includes animated sections, responsive layouts, engaging UI components, and optimized performance. It was designed to demonstrate frontend design principles and user experience best practices.

title: Doctor Appointment Booking
description: A frontend application for booking doctor appointments online.
longDescription: A healthcare appointment booking interface built using React and Vite. Users can browse doctors, explore available services, and schedule appointments through an intuitive interface. The project focuses on responsive layouts, reusable React components, and modern frontend development practices.

title: Apple Website Clone
description: A visually engaging Apple-inspired landing page with 3D interactions.
longDescription: An Apple-inspired frontend experience developed with React, Vite, and Three.js. The application showcases interactive 3D animations, smooth scrolling, modern UI components, and responsive layouts to recreate the premium feel of Apple's official website.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio website showcasing projects and technical skills.
longDescription: A clean and responsive personal portfolio developed with React and Tailwind CSS. The website highlights projects, skills, contact information, and provides a modern developer portfolio experience with responsive layouts and reusable components.
